topbar.best_alltime: All-time best for {{env}} — persists across restarts

sidebar.title: Parameters
sidebar.train_needs_gpu: Training this game needs a GPU (available on the desktop). You can still play it by hand now — use the Play button below.
sidebar.train_not_implemented: Training for this game isn't built yet — pixel-based games need the GPU (CnnPolicy) trainer that's coming in a later version. You can still play it by hand now — use the Play button below.
sidebar.train_not_implemented_ma: Training for this world is coming in a later step — each species needs its own brain. For now you can just watch the untrained world move (it isn't hand-playable — a swarm has no single driver).
sidebar.train_not_implemented_board: Self-play training for board games is coming in a later step. For now, play against the built-in AI with the Play button below — pick a side and a difficulty.

stats.no_data: Start training to see live stats

envpreview.title: Environment
envpreview.visual_on_hint: Live preview — turn off for faster training
envpreview.visual_off_hint: Visual off — training runs at full speed
envpreview.idle_hint: Start training to watch the agent play

play.no_checkpoints: Save a checkpoint to watch the AI
play.playing_hint: Keyboard active — see How to play

board.pick_side: Pick a side and an opponent, then press Play
board.training: Training — watching the AI learn by self-play
board.result_draw_watch: Draw — perfect play on both sides
board.cell_select: Select your piece at row {{row}}, column {{col}}
board.cell_selected: Selected piece at row {{row}}, column {{col}} — click again to deselect
board.select_piece: Your move — click one of your pieces
board.select_dest: Now click a highlighted square to move there
board.must_pass: No legal move — you must pass

watch.title: About {{env}}
watch.pick_save: Pick a saved model to watch
watch.train_first: Train and save a model to watch it play

playscore.title: High Scores
playscore.board_deferred: Board games are scored win / draw / loss, not by points — leaderboards arrive with self-play training in a later step.

chart.title: Reward Chart
chart.placeholder: Start training to see the live chart

species.predator_desc: Slower hunters that share a reward for every touch of the prey — they learn to chase, corner and ambush.
species.prey_desc: A faster runner, penalised for being caught — it learns to dodge, flee and use the space to escape.
species.obstacles_desc: Fixed grey blocks scattered in the arena that both species must steer around.

leaderboard.title: Top-5 Children
leaderboard.evo_hint: Run Neuroevolution to populate the leaderboard
leaderboard.best_row: Current best — shown in the live preview

evolution.title: Evolution Stats
evolution.evo_hint: Run Neuroevolution to see live stats

qtable.title: Q-table
qtable.hint: Run Q-learning to watch the table fill in

saveload.title: Save / Load
saveload.nothing_to_save: Start a run first — nothing to save yet
saveload.moved_hint: Save / load is in the sidebar, under the Run button

runs.title: Run history
runs.empty: No finished runs yet — train a run to compare it later
runs.max_hint: Overlay up to 3 past runs on the chart
runs.no_overlay: Selected runs have no data for this tab
